---
title: "Stepwise escenari 50%"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: html_document
---

# STEPWISE 50%
```{r}
# Aquest script aplica selecció de variables amb el mètode stepwise
# en un escenari amb 50% de dades simulades.
# Es carreguen les dades i les combinacions d’escenaris (N, pi i correlació).

setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")
library(bigmemory)
library(biglm)
library(bigstep)
library(caret)

resultats_step50 <- data.frame(
  N = integer(), pi = numeric(), correlation = character(), iter = integer(),
  Sensibilitat = numeric(), Especificitat = numeric(),
  VPP = numeric(), VPN = numeric(), Accuracy = numeric(),
  NetBenefit = numeric()
)

vars_seleccionades_step <- list()

system.time({
  for (i in  1:nrow(comb)) {
    N          <- comb$N[i]
    pi         <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i]) 
    
    metrics <- list()
    vars_selec_bin <- matrix(0, nrow = iters, ncol = 100)
    
    for (j in 1:iters) {
      print(paste("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j,
                  "| N =", N, "| pi =", pi, "| corr =", correlation))
      
      x_mat <- X[[i]][[j]]
      colnames(x_mat) <- paste0("X", 1:ncol(x_mat))
      y_vec <- Y[[i]][[j]]
      dades <- data.frame(y = y_vec, x_mat)
      # Model nul i model complet
      model_null <- glm(y ~ 1,   data = dades, family = binomial)
      model_full <- glm(y ~ .,   data = dades, family = binomial)
            # Selecció stepwise (bidireccional)
      model_step <- step(model_null,
                         scope = list(lower = model_null, upper = model_full),
                         direction = "both", trace = 0)
      
      
      vars_seleccionades <- which(coefficients(model_step)[-1] != 0)
      vars_selec_bin[j, vars_seleccionades] <- 1
      metrics[[j]] <- metriques(vars_seleccionades, nv = num_vars)
    }
    
    resultats_step50 <- rbind(resultats_step50, data.frame(
      N           = N,
      pi          = pi,
      correlation = correlation,
      Sensibilitat = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["sensibilitat"]), na.rm = TRUE),
      Especificitat = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["especificitat"]), na.rm = TRUE),
      VPP          = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPP"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
      VPN          = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPN"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
      Accuracy     = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["accuracy"]),      na.rm = TRUE),
      NetBenefit   = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["net_benefit"]),   na.rm = TRUE)
    ))
    
    vars_seleccionades_step[[i]] <- vars_selec_bin
  }
})

print(resultats_step50)
save(resultats_step50, vars_seleccionades_step, file = "resultats_step50_proba1.RData")
```
